entities.name: BOTRYTIS CINEREA
entities.description: Causal organism of chickpea analyzed for morphological, cultural, virulence and genetic variations

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Host crop affected by Botrytis cinerea

entities.name: INDO-GANGETIC PLAINS
entities.description: Region in India where Botrytis cinerea isolates were collected

entities.name: MORPHOLOGICAL VARIATIONS
entities.description: Physical characteristics of Botrytis cinerea isolates including conidial formation and size

entities.name: CULTURAL VARIATIONS
entities.description: Growth-related characteristics of Botrytis cinerea isolates including optimum growth

entities.name: VIRULENCE
entities.description: The ability of Botrytis cinerea isolates to cause disease

entities.name: GENETIC VARIATIONS
entities.description: Differences in the genetic makeup of Botrytis cinerea isolates

entities.name: PATHOGENICITY
entities.description: The capacity of the organism to cause disease in a host, used to characterize virulence

entities.name: RAPD ANALYSIS
entities.description: Randomly amplified polymorphic DNA analysis used for genetic characterization

entities.name: RAPD MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used in RAPD analysis to differentiate isolates

entities.name: OPTIMUM GROWTH
entities.description: The ideal conditions for the growth of the organism

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor affecting the growth of Botrytis cinerea

entities.name: CONIDIAL FORMATION
entities.description: The process and pattern of spore production

entities.name: SIZE OF CONIDIA
entities.description: The physical dimensions of the spores

entities.name: POTATO DEXTROSE AGAR
entities.description: Growth medium used for analyzing isolates

entities.name: CLUSTER ANALYSIS
entities.description: Statistical method used to group isolates into pathotypes and genetic groups

entities.name: PATHOTYPES
entities.description: Groups of isolates with similar virulence characteristics

entities.name: GENETIC SIMILARITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic relatedness between isolates based on RAPD banding patterns
